news.title: The CFTC has sparked a potential revolution on Wall Street. Exchange stocks are dropping
news.summary: Investors are worried about increased competition for the traditional exchanges that have long dominated on Wall Street. Investors are worried that increased competition will lead to a decline in the number of traditional exchanges.

news.title: Rubio says U.S. is in talks with Iran over nuclear program as senators press for war endgame
news.summary: Rubio says Iran nuclear talks may advance soon as senators press Trump on war strategy, Strait of Hormuz, Cuba and Venezuela policy.

news.title: Trump signs AI executive order asking companies to give government early access to models
news.summary: AI developers, on a voluntary basis, are asked to collaborate with the government and provide early access to frontier models. The government is looking for ways to make AI more accessible to the public.

news.title: Trump names housing chief Bill Pulte acting intelligence director, replacing Tulsi Gabbard
news.summary: Pulte has alleged wrongdoing related to mortgages against Trump's foes, Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook and New York Attorney General Letitia James.

news.title: Job openings in April surged to 7.6 million, the highest in nearly two years
news.summary: The Bureau of Labor Statistics reported that available employment hit 7.6 million for the month. That's a surge of 731,000 from the prior month.

news.title: The S&P 500 has only risen this quickly 4 times since WWII. Once, a historic stock-market crash followed.
news.summary: The S&P 500 has overcome worries about artificial intelligence and the fallout from the war in Iran to stage one of its strongest two-month showings on record.

news.title: The Iran war is jacking up fertilizer prices and forcing farmers to make tough calls. ‘If I guess wrong, I lose the farm.’
news.summary: Preston Arrington's 2,100-acre corn and soybean farm is one of the biggest challenges on his farm. The surge in the price of fertilizer is also one of his biggest challenges.

news.title: Buying into SpaceX, Anthropic and other mega-IPOs could be a problem for your index fund
news.summary: Index rules and timelines will divide winners and losers. Index rules and timeline will divide Winners and Losers in the index industry. The index industry is in a state of flux as it tries to figure out how to make a profit.

news.title: This winning high-yield bond strategy limits risk while seeking under-the-radar opportunities
news.summary: Hunter Hayes of Intrepid Capital described an “incredibly healthy’ market for high-yield bonds. Hayes said he takes a conservative approach to investing in the space.

news.title: I was a slave to credit-card debt, then I got laid off and turned my life around. Here’s how I did it.
news.summary: “I have steadily increased my assets by more than 10% since being laid off,” he says. “I’ve been able to get my life back on track.”
